title: MinerU 2.5 PDF Parser
description: Serverless PDF → Markdown / JSON conversion via MinerU 2.5 (1.2B VLM). Scales to zero with a 10 s idle window, ~$0.0001 per page on AMPERE_24. Three input transports (URL / base64 / mounted volume), two output formats (gzipped tarball / inline). Generic — meant to be a reusable PDF-parsing primitive for RAG and document-context systems.
